params.name: Glory Extractor
params.description: Gods usually leave a smattering of divine energy in the proximity to where they descended. Glory Extractor is created to collect these energies. It gathers dispersing Glory on its own, and after refinement, converts that into pure energy to power other devices that are connected to it!
